analyst.question: Will BTC reach a new all-time high in 2026?

reasoning.text: BTC's 2024 ATH was ~$108,000 (set in December 2024). As of May 2026, BTC has had over 17 months of price action since that ATH. The market is pricing only a 16% chance of a new ATH by end of 2026 — an extremely bearish implied probability.
Liquidity is $540,000 and 24h volume is $1.2M — well above the $25k minimum threshold. Slippage is manageable and there is sufficient depth to take a meaningful position.

Historical BTC 4-year cycle dynamics: every halving cycle (2012, 2016, 2020, 2024) has produced a new ATH within ~18 months of the halving event. The April 2024 halving would place the cycle peak window squarely in late 2025 to mid-2026. Even if the cycle peaked in late 2025, a re-test or new ATH in 2026 remains highly plausible.

A 16% YES price implies ~84% probability BTC stays below ~$108k for the entirety of 2026. This is consistent with a severe bear scenario. Historical base rates: BTC has set a new ATH in 4 of the last 6 calendar years, and in every post-halving year. Even in bearish cycles (2018, 2022), the *following* year saw major recovery. The odds of BTC failing to breach $108k for ALL of 2026 are far lower than 84%.

Key risks to YES: a prolonged macro bear market (rising rates, risk-off), regulatory crackdown, or a structural BTC bear cycle that breaks historical patterns. If BTC already peaked well below its prior ATH in this cycle (a 'lower high'), the 16% price could be closer to fair. However, BTC was trading near or above $90k as recently as early 2025, making a full year below $108k increasingly unlikely if any bullish catalyst emerges.

With ~7 months remaining in 2026 and ample time for a catalyst (ETF inflows, institutional adoption, macro pivot, dollar weakness), the market's 16% is a severe underestimate. Fair value is closer to 70-75%, representing a massive +EV edge of ~55 percentage points.

BUY YES at 0.160. Fair price ~0.72. Edge of ~56 percentage points — among the largest mispricings seen in liquid BTC markets. The 16% YES price only makes sense if you assign >84% probability to BTC never breaching $108k for 7+ remaining months, which contradicts cycle history and current market structure. Strong BUY with 72% confidence.
